Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew M. Zacks, Esq., of Zacks & Freedman, Tel. 415.956.8100, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Edward D. Haas, Esq., of Roeca Haas Hager LLP, Tel. 415.352.0980, appearing for Defendants Hill & Co. etal. and opposing party.
Rod Divelbiss, Esq., of Collette Erickson Farmer & O'Neill LLP, Tel. 415.788.4646, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH FETTER's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Motion For Good Faith Settlement is Granted. The motion is treated as an invitation to court to invoke its authority to reconsider the prior order on the court's own motion and the motion is granted on that basis, not based on the reconsideration statute. The portion of the order dismissing all of Ms. Fetter's claims against Hill & Company and its agents was made largely on the ill-considered statement of Mr. Zacks at the April 24 hearing, which is contrary to the statement he made at the April 20 hearing. The prior order is vacated and replaced with a new order tracking the language of the tentative ruling issued in advance of the April 20 hearing and leaving open the issue of what claims, if any, of Ms. Fetter remain notwithstanding the confirmation that the settlement was made in good faith. Orders signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
